'''Misnor''' was an [[Water/Legends|ice]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] which unlike other [[Temperature/Legends|frozen]] planets, had [[Water/Legends|water]]. [[Chiilak/Legends|Chiilaks]] were native to Misnor.<ref name="CotG" />

{{Planet-stub}}
